titleStmt.title: SII 18.157: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 157. (B.K. No. 78 of 1932-33.) HĀVĒRI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab in the temple of Siddhēśvara.

summary.p: This inscription, which refers itself to the reign of Trailōkyamalladēva, is dated in the 3rd year of his reign, Āṅgira, Pushya Amāvāsyā, Sunday, Uttārāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, solar eclipse. The date is irregular. In the cyclic year Āṅgira corresponding to A.D. 1152, Pushya Amāvāsyā fell on December 27. But it was not a Sunday, nor was there any eclipse or Saṁkrānti on that day.

It records a grant of certain taxes to god Siddhēśvaradēva of the agrahāra town Hāvari by Sāvāsi Māyidēva, jointly with five-hundred Baṇajigas. Māyidēva was in charge of the hejjuṅka and vaḍḍarāvuḷa taxes. The grant was made in the presence of the four-hundred Mahājanas of Hāvari. Daṇḍanāyaka Mahadevarasa is stated to be governing Huligeṟe Three-hundred and Banavase Twelve-thousand.

A supplementary grant of money and taxes made by Māchidēva of the Jīmūtavāhana lineage and Khachara family, the nārgāvuṇḍa of Bāsavūr One-hundred-and-forty and by Heggaḍe Rechaṇa and others, is also recorded. The gift was made for the offerings and a perpetual lamp to the same god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicandracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarā
raṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī
prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyā
śrayakulatilaka cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatraiḷōkyamalladē
vara rājyamuttarōttarābhivridhdhipravarddhamānamā
caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmōpajī
vi samadhigata paṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmaṁtādhipati karitu
rayapaṭṭapāhaṇi sēnādhipati mahāpracaṁḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ
gara mahadēvarasaru huligeṟe munnūṟumaṁ banava
se pannircchāsiramumaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadinanubhavi
suttamire tatupādapadmōpajīvi . samadhigatapaṁcama
hāśabbamahāsāmantādhipati va hāpracaṁḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ
kāśmīramukhamaṁḍanaṁ sāvāsi māyidēvarasaru hejjuṁka vaḍḍa
rāvuḷamananubhavisuttaṁ baṇajigaraynūrvvarvverasu dharmmō
dyuktacittarāgi śrīmaccāḷukya traiḷōkyamalladēvavarṣada 3
neyūṁgirasaṁvatsarada puṣyadamāvāsye Ādityavāra vuttarā
yaṇasaṁkrānti sūryyagrahaṇa vyatīpātameṁba puṇyatithigaḷoṁ
dāgalu . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānu
ṣṭhānajapasamādhiśīḷaguṇasaṁpaṁnnaru śrīsidhdhēśvaradēvalabdhavara
prasādarappa śrīmadanādiyagrahāraṁ . hāvariya mahājanaṁ
nālnūrbbarumaṁ nerapi saṁbhavaṇigedaṁbulamaṁgoṭṭu śrīsiddhēśvaradēvara ni
tyanīvēdyakke devasavaḷaṁ taḷada davasāyada mūṟu hēṟina
ṭhāṇōghada mūṟu vīsavaṁ caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ naḍavantāgi biṭṭarintī dharmmama
nārōrbbaru pratipāḷisidavargge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētraprayāgeya
rghyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷu sāsira kavilegaḷa kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ ponnuṁbeḷḷiyo
ḷaṁ kaṭṭisi sāsirbbarvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇarige koṭṭa phalamaneydu
varintī dharmmamanārōrbbaraḷidavaranitu tīrtthaṁgaḷoḷanitu ka
vilegaḷananibaru brāhmaṇarumaṁ koṁda mahāpātakamaneydu
varu . © svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō dharmmaṁ haratē naraḥ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrā
ṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . © © . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśa
bda mahāsāmantaṁ vijayalakṣmīkāntaṁ samastavasumatītaḷakhyātaṁ jīmūtavāhaThe letter ya is written below the line.
nānvayaprasūtaṁ khacaravaṁśōdbhavaṁ baṁdhujanakamaḷinīrājahamsaṁ
parivārajanahridayasantōṣaṁ padmāvatīlabdhavaraprasādaṁ vitaraṇakōḷā
haḷaṁ vairipannagavainatēyaṁ satyarādhēyaṁ sāhasōttuṁganayyanasingaṁ
nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāsāmantaṁ mūcidēvarasaru
bāsavura nūṟanālvattarkkaṁ nārggāvuṇḍugeyyuttamirddu mācidēvarasanuṁ hega
ḍe rēcaṇanuṁ suṁkaverggaḍe tīkarasanuṁ samastaparigrahamirḻdu hāva
riya śrīsiddhēśvaradēvara nityanivēdyakke tammakoḍavīsada suṁkadoḷage devasavaḷavo
ndu vīsamumaṁ nandādīvigege varṣakkeraḍu paṇamumaṁ caṁdrārkkatāraṁba
raṁ naḍavantāgi biṭṭaru . © .
Digital edition of SII 18.157 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
